step: Grouped counties present in population data
notes: Checks whether all 25 required grouped counties appear in the population source.
Uses the strongest available ZIP-to-tract ratio field to choose a county per ZIP.
Assigns each open Ohio NCES school to a county using ZIP-based mapping.

step: Ohio schools mapped to JACO regions
notes: Only schools inside the 25 grouped counties receive a JACO region.
Exact join between NCES-derived Ohio IRN and the Title I/SSI building IRN.
Exact normalized school-name match when the high-need workbook has only one school with that normalized name.
Fallback matching within district after school-name normalization.
Primary organization-to-school match using normalized school name with county as a secondary check.
Unique normalized school-name fallback when county does not produce a direct match.
Cautious fuzzy fallback inside the same county when exact normalized matching fails.

step: Tracker rows assigned to JACO regions
notes: Rows outside the 25 grouped counties remain unassigned and are shown as limitations.
